Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint; Request For Order Clarifying Amendment/Demurrer Sequence
Off Calendar Apr-30-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (by Zoom):
Francisco Dylan Rosario, Esq. 650-488-7510 Plaintiff. (In-person)
Tyler O'Connell, Esq. 916-929-1481 Porter Scott for Defendant.

The Court admonishes Mr. Rosario. The Court did not receive any timely notice to contest and states "if the matter is not contested the Court's tentative ruling is adopted. Counsel objects to not having any notice. The Court hears arguments since both sides are present.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Franciscus Dylan Rosario's Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint; Request For Order Clarifying Amendment/Demurrer Sequence is DENIED.

(see word minutes for full details)

A proposed order is submitted for the court's review and signature.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
